topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that automate smart-home devices based on the occupancy status detected by the Nest Thermostat, optimizing energy use by turning lights on or off and adjusting other devices accordingly.

rows.if_then_rule: IF Nest set to Home from Nest Thermostat THEN change camera mode using Withings Home to stop monitoring.
IF Nest set to Away from Nest Thermostat THEN turn off using WeMo Smart Plug.
